summary: Completed testing of Iteration 14 code quality refactoring. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The refactored CourseDetailPage with sub-components (CourseHeader, LessonCard, EnrolledStudents, GoogleImportDialog) renders correctly. Backend search.py with service functions works correctly. React hook deps, useMemo, and stable IDs all functioning properly.
critical_code_review_comments: CourseDetailPage.jsx: Successfully refactored from 811 to 240 lines using sub-components
CourseHeader.jsx: Extracted component handles course info, enrollment status, progress display
LessonCard.jsx: Extracted component handles lesson display, expansion, file attachments, Google imports
EnrolledStudents.jsx: Extracted component shows enrolled students with progress bars
GoogleImportDialog.jsx: Extracted component handles Google Slides/Docs import dialog
DashboardPage.jsx: Hook deps fixed with eslint-disable comment for mount-only fetch
CohortDetailPage.jsx: useMemo added for sortedLeaderboard computation
Sidebar.jsx: useMemo added for visibleNavItems filter based on user role

test_credentials.test_session_created: ITER14_UI_TEST_ prefixed session for UI testing (cleaned up)

seed_data_creation: Test user with faculty role and test course/lesson created for CourseDetailPage testing (all cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 was a code quality refactoring pass. No new features added. Key changes: (1) CourseDetailPage split into 4 sub-components - CourseHeader, LessonCard, EnrolledStudents, GoogleImportDialog. (2) search.py refactored with helper functions for each search type. (3) React hook deps fixed with eslint-disable comments for mount-only fetches. (4) Empty catches now log errors. (5) Array index keys replaced with stable IDs (lesson.id, file.id, etc). (6) useMemo added for expensive computations (sortedLeaderboard in CohortDetailPage, visibleNavItems in Sidebar). All routes and data-testids work the same as before.
